debug_info.goal:
α : Type
s : Skeleton
idx : SkeletonLeafIndex s
leafValue : α
proof : List α
f : FunctionType (InductiveMerkleTree.spec α)
⊢ runWithOracle f (InductiveMerkleTree.getPutativeRoot α s idx leafValue proof) =
    InductiveMerkleTree.getPutativeRoot_with_hash α s idx leafValue proof fun left right => @f (left, right)

failed_attempts:
induction proof generalizing s with
  | nil =>
    unfold getPutativeRoot
    simp only [runWithOracle_pure, getPutativeRoot_with_hash]
  | cons siblingBelowRootHash restProof ih =>
    unfold getPutativeRoot
    cases s with
    | leaf =>
      cases idx with
      | ofLeaf =>
        simp_all [runWithOracle_pure, getPutativeRoot_with_hash]
        <;> rfl
    | internal s_left s_right =>
      cases idx with
      | ofLeft idxLeft =>
        simp_all [runWithOracle_bind, singleHash, runWithOracle_pure, getPutativeRoot_with_hash]
        <;>
        (try simp_all [BinaryTree.SkeletonLeafIndex.ofLeft]) <;>
        (try simp_all [BinaryTree.SkeletonLeafIndex.ofRight]) <;>
        (try simp_all [List.cons, List.nil]) <;>
        (try simp_all [runWithOracle_bind, singleHash, runWithOracle_pure, getPutativeRoot_with_hash]) <;>
        (try see)
        <;>
        (try rfl)
      | ofRight idxRight =>
        simp_all [runWithOracle_bind, singleHash, runWithOracle_pure, getPutativeRoot_with_hash]
        <;>
        (try simp_all [BinaryTree.SkeletonLeafIndex.ofLeft]) <;>
        (try simp_all [BinaryTree.SkeletonLeafIndex.ofRight]) <;>
        (try simp_all [List.cons, List.nil]) <;>
        (try simp_all [runWithOracle_bind, singleHash, runWithOracle_pure, getPutativeRoot_with_hash]) <;>
        (try see)
        <;>
        (try rfl)

stop
  induction proof generalizing s with
  | nil =>
    unfold getPutativeRoot
    simp only [runWithOracle_pure, getPutativeRoot_with_hash]
  | cons siblingBelowRootHash restProof ih =>
    unfold getPutativeRoot
    cases s with
    | leaf =>
      cases idx with
      | ofLeaf =>
        rfl
      | ofLeft _ => contradiction
      | ofRight _ => contradiction
    | internal s_left s_right =>
      cases idx with
      | ofLeft idxLeft =>
        simp_all [runWithOracle_bind, getPutativeRoot_with_hash, spec]
        <;>
        (try simp_all) <;>
        (try aesop) <;>
        (try
          {
            have h₁ := @ih s_left _ _ _
            simp_all [getPutativeRoot_with_hash, runWithOracle_bind, spec]
            <;>
            (try simp_all) <;>
            (try aesop)
          }) <;>
        (try
          {
            funext l r
            rfl
          })
      | ofRight idxRight =>
        simp_all [runWithOracle_bind, getPutativeRoot_with_hash, spec]
        <;>
        (try simp_all) <;>
        (try aesop) <;>
        (try
          {
            have h₂ := @ih s_right _ _ _
            simp_all [getPutativeRoot_with_hash, runWithOracle_bind, spec]
            <;>
            (try simp_all) <;>
            (try aesop)
          }) <;>
        (try
          {
            funext l r
            rfl
          })

induction proof generalizing s with
  | nil =>
    simp [getPutativeRoot, getPutativeRoot_with_hash]
  | cons siblingBelowRootHash restProof ih =>
    simp_all [getPutativeRoot, getPutativeRoot_with_hash, runWithOracle_bind, runWithOracle_pure, singleHash]
    <;>
    (try cases s <;> simp_all [Skeleton.leaf, Skeleton.internal, skeletonEq, BinarySkeleton.leaf, BinarySkeleton.natRec])
    <;>
    (try cases idx <;> simp_all [Skeleton.leaf, Skeleton.internal, skeletonEq, BinarySkeleton.leaf, BinarySkeleton.natRec])
    <;>
    (try {
      simp_all [runWithOracle_bind, runWithOracle_pure, singleHash]
      <;>
      congr 1 <;>
      funext ⟨a, b⟩ <;>
      simp_all [runWithOraclebind, runWithOracle_pure, singleHash]
      <;>
      aesop
    })
    <;>
    (try {
      simp_all [runWithOracle_bind, runWithOracle_pure, singleHash]
      <;>
      congr 1 <;>
      funext ⟨a, b⟩ <;>
      simp_all [runWithOracle_bind, runWithOracle_pure, singleHash]
      <;>
      aesop
    })
    <;>
    (try simp_all [runWithOracle_bind, runWithOracle_pure, singleHash])
    <;>
    (try {
      simp_all [getPutativeRoot, getPutativeRoot_with_hash, runWithOracle_bind, runWithOracle_pure, singleHash]
      <;>
      simp_all [Function.funext_iff]
      <;>
      aesop
    })

[runWithOracle_bind, runWithOracle_pure]
        <;>
        (try rfl)
        <;>
        (try simp_all [function.funext_iff, Product.ext_iff])
        <;>
        (try simp_all [runWithOracle_bind, runWithOracle_pure])
        <;>
        (try rfl)
        <;>
        (try simp_all [function.funext_iff, Product.ext_iff])
        <;>
        (try simp_all [runWithOracle_bind, runWithOracle_pure])
        <;>
        (try rfl)

have h_main : ∀ (s : Skeleton) (idx : SkeletonLeafIndex s) (leafValue : α) (proof : List α) (f : (α × α) → α),
    runWithOracle f (getPutativeRoot idx leafValue proof) = getPutativeRoot_with_hash idx leafValue proof (fun left right => f (left, right)) := by
    intro s
    induction' proof with siblingBelowRootHash restProof ih
    · -- Base case: proof = []
      intro idx leafValue f
      simp [getPutativeRoot, getPutativeRoot_with_hash]
    · -- Inductive step: proof = siblingBelowRootHash :: restProof
      intro idx leafValue f
      cases idx with
      | ofLeaf =>
        -- Case: idx = ofLeaf
        simp [getPutativeRoot, getPutativeRoot_with_hash]
      | ofLeft idxLeft =>
        -- Case: idx = ofLeft idxLeft
        simp_all [getPutativeRoot, getPutativeRoot_with_hash, runWithOracle_bind, singleHash]
        <;>
        (try simp_all [Skeleton, SkeletonLeafIndex, BinaryTree.SkeletonLeafIndex]) <;>
        (try simp_all [List.cons, List.nil]) <;>
        (try simp_all [Function.comp_apply]) <;>
        (try simp_all [Prod.mk.injEq]) <;>
        (try ring_nf at *) <;>
        (try aesop)
      | ofRight idxRight =>
        -- Case: idx = ofRight idxRight
        simp_all [getPutativeRoot, getPutativeRoot_with_hash, runWithOracle_bind, singleHash]
        <;>
        (try simp_all [Skeleton, SkeletonLeafIndex, BinaryTree.SkeletonLeafIndex]) <;>
        (try simp_all [List.cons, List.nil]) <;>
        (try simp_all [Function.comp_apply]) <;>
        (try simp_all [Prod.mk.injEq]) <;>
        (try ring_nf at *) <;>
        (try aesop)
  
  have h_final : runWithOracle f (getPutativeRoot idx leafValue proof) = getPutativeRoot_with_hash idx leafValue proof (fun left right => (f : (α × α) → α) (left, right)) := by
    have h := h_main s idx leafValue proof f
    exact h
  -- Convert the result to match the expected type
  simpa [Function.comp_apply] using h_final

stop

  | cons siblingBelowRootHash restProof ih =>

    cases s with
    | leaf =>
      cases idx with
      | ofLeaf =>
        simp only [runWithOracle_pure, getPutativeRoot_with_hash, List.cons, List.nil]
        <;> rfl
      | ofLeft i => contradiction
      | ofRight i => contradiction
    | internal s_left s_right =>
      cases idx with
      | ofLeft idxLeft =>
        simp_all [runWithOracle_bind, singleHash, getPutativeRoot_with_hash]
        <;>
        (try contradiction) <;>
        (try simp_all [Function.funext_iff]) <;>
        (try aesop) <;>
        (try
          {

            <;>

          }) <;>
        (try
          {

        <;>

            <;>

          })
      | ofRight idxRight =>
        simp_all [runWithOracle_bind, singleHash, getPutativeRoot_with_hash]
        <;>
        (try contradiction) <;>
        (try simp_all [Function.funext_iff]) <;>

    simp only [runWithOracle_pure, getPutativeRoot_with_hash]
  | cons siblingBelowRootHash restProof ih =>

have h₁ : ∀ (l : List α) (s : Skeleton) (idx : SkeletonLeafIndex s),
      (runWithOracle f (getPutativeRoot α s idx leafValue l)) =
      (getPutativeRoot_with_hash α s idx leafValue l fun (left right : α) => (f ⟨left, right⟩)) := by
    intro l
    induction l generalize s generalizing s with
    | nil =>
      intro s
      intro idx
      induction s with
      | leaf =>
        cases idx with
        | ofLeaf =>
          simp [getPutativeRoot, getPutativeRoot_with_hash]
      | internal sleft sright =>
        cases idx with
        | ofLeft idxLeft =>
          simp_all [getPutativeRoot, getPutativeRoot_with_hash]
          <;> induction sleft <;> simp_all [getPutativeRoot, getPutativeRoot_with_hash, skeleton]
          <;> try contradiction
        | ofRight idxRight =>
          simp_all [getPutativeRoot, getPutativeRoot_with_hash]
          <;> induction sright <;> simp_all [getPutativeRoot, getPutativeRoot_with_hash, skeleton]
          <;> try contradiction
    | cons a l ih =>
      intro s
      intro idx
      induction s with
      | leaf =>
        cases idx with
        | ofLeaf =>
          simp_all [getPutativeRoot, getPutativeRoot_with_hash]
          <;> induction l <;> simp_all [getPutativeRoot, getPutativeRoot_with_hash, list]
          <;> try contradiction
        | ofLeft idxLeft =>
          simp_all [getPutativeRoot, getPutativeRoot_with_hash]
          <;> induction s <;> simp_all [getPutativeRoot, getPutativeRoot_with_hash, skeleton]
          <;> try contradiction
        | ofRight idxRight =>
          simp_all [getPutativeRoot, getPutativeRoot_with_hash]
          <;> induction s <;> simp_all [getPutativeRoot, getPutativeRoot_with_hash, skeleton]
          <;> try contradiction
      | internal sleft sright =>
        cases idx with
        | ofLeft idxLeft =>
          simp_all [getPutativeRoot, getPutativeRoot_with_hash, runWithOracle_bind]
          <;>
          (try simp_all [ih, sleft, sright, list]) <;>
          (try
            {
              induction sleft with
              | leaf =>
                simp_all [getPutativeRoot, getPutativeRoot_with_hash, runWithOracle_bind]
                <;>
                (try simp_all [ih, sleft, sright, list]) <;>
                (try contradiction)
              | internal sleft' sright' =>
                simp_all [getPutativeRoot, getPutativeRoot_with_hash, runWithOracle_bind]
                <;>
                (try simp_all [ih, sleft, sright, list]) <;>
                (try contradiction)
            }) <;>
          (try
            {
              induction sright with
              | leaf =>
                simp_all [getPutativeRoot, getPutativeRoot_with_hash, runWithOracle_bind]
                <;>
                (try simp_all [ih, sleft, sright, list]) <;>
                (try contradiction)
              | internal sleft' sright' =>
                simp_all [getPutativeRoot, getPutativeRoot_with_hash, runWithOracle_bind]
                <;>
                (try simp_all [ih, sleft, sright, list]) <;>
                (try contradiction)
            }) <;>
          (try
            {
              simp_all [ih, sleft, sright, list]
              <;>
              (try contradiction)
            }) <;>
          (try
            {
              simp_all [getPutativeRoot, getPutativeRoot_with_hash, runWithOracle_bind]
              <;>
              (try simp_all [ih, sleft, sright, list]) <;>
              (try contradiction)
            })
          <;>
          (try simp_all [ih, sleft, sright, list]) <;>
          (try contradiction)
        | ofRight idxRight =>
          simp_all [getPutativeRoot, getPutativeRoot_with_hash, runWithOracle_bind]
          <;>
          (try simp_all [ih, sleft, sright, list]) <;>
          (try
            {
              induction sleft with
              | leaf =>
                simp_all [getPutativeRoot, getPutativeRoot_with_hash, runWithOracle_bind]
                <;>
                (try simp_all [ih, sleft, sright, list]) <;>
                (try contradiction)
              | internal sleft' sright' =>
                simp_all [getPutativeRoot, getPutativeRoot_with_hash, runWithOracle_bind]
                <;>
                (try simp_all [ih, sleft, sright, list]) <;>
                (try contradiction)
            }) <;>
          (try
            {
              induction sright with
              | leaf =>
                simp_all [getPutativeRoot, getPutativeRoot_with_hash, runWithOracle_bind]
                <;>
                (try simp_all [ih, sleft, sright, list]) <;>
                (try contradiction)
              | internal sleft' sright' =>
                simp_all [getPutativeRoot, getPutativeRoot_with_hash, runWithOracle_bind]
                <;>
                (try simp_all [ih, sleft, sright, list]) <;>
                (try contradiction)
            }) <;>
          (try
            {
              simp_all [ih, sleft, sright, list]
              <;>
              (try contradiction)
            }) <;>
          (try
            {
              simp_all [getPutativeRoot, getPutativeRoot_with_hash, runWithOracle_bind]
              <;>
              (try simp_all [ih, sleft, sright, list]) <;>
              (try contradiction)
            })
          <;>
          (try simp_all [ih, sleft, sright, list]) <;>
          (try contradiction)
  have h₂ := h₁ proof
  simp_all

stop
  induction proof generalizing s with
  | nil =>
    unfold getPutativeRoot
    simp only [runWithOracle_pure, getPutativeRoot_with_hash]
  | cons siblingBelowRootHash restProof ih =>
    unfold getPutativeRoot
    cases s with
    | leaf =>
      cases idx with
      | ofLeaf =>
        rfl
    | internal s_left s_right =>
      cases idx with
      | ofLeft idxLeft =>
        simp [runWithOracle_bind, ih]
        <;> simp_all [getPutativeRoot_with_hash, singleHash]
        <;> rfl
      | ofRight idxRight =>
        simp only [runWithOracle_bind, ih]
        <;> simp_all [getPutativeRoot_with_hash, singleHash]
        <;> rfl

induction proof generalizing s with
  | nil =>
    simp only [getPutativeRoot, runWithOracle_pure, getPutativeRoot_with_hash]
  | cons siblingBelowRootHash restProof ih =>
    cases s with
    | leaf =>
      cases idx with
      | ofLeaf =>
        simp_all [getPutativeRoot, getPutativeRoot_with_hash, singleHash, runWithOracle_bind]
        <;> rfl
    | internal s_left s_right =>
      cases idx with
      | ofLeft idxLeft =>
        simp_all [getPutativeRoot, getPutativeRoot_with_hash, singleHash, runWithOracle_bind]
        <;> (try { rfl })
        <;> (try {
          simp_all [FunctionType.funext_iff]
          <;>
          (try { intros; rfl })
          <;>
          (try { simp_all [f] })
          <;>
          (try { rfl })
        })
        <;> (try {
          aesop
        })
      | ofRight idxRight =>
        simp_all [getPutativeRoot, getPutativeRoot_with_hash, singleHash, runWithOracle_bind]
        <;> (try { rfl })
        <;> (try {
          simp_all [FunctionType.funext_iff]
          <;>
          (try { intros; rfl })
          <;>
          (try { simp_all [f] })
          <;>
          (try { rfl })
        })
        <;> (try {
          aesop
        })

stop
  induction proof generalizing s with
  | nil =>
    unfold getPutativeRoot
    simp only [runWithOracle_pure, getPutativeRoot_with_hash]
  | cons siblingBelowRootHash restProof ih =>
    unfold getPutativeRoot
    cases s with
    | leaf =>
      cases idx with
      | ofLeaf =>
        rfl
      <;> simp_all [BinaryTree.SkeletonLeafIndex, Skeleton]
      <;> try contradiction
    | internal s_left s_right =>
      cases idx with
      | ofLeft idxLeft =>
        simp_all [BinaryTree.SkeletonLeafIndex, Skeleton, runWithOracle_bind]
        <;>
        (try simp_all [getPutativeRoot_with_hash, singleHash, runWithOracle_pure]) <;>
        (try simp_all [runWithOracle_bind, ih]) <;>
        (try simp_all [List.cons, List.nil]) <;>
        (try simp_all [Function.funext_iff]) <;>
        (try ring_nf at *) <;>
        (try simp_all [Function.funext_iff]) <;>
        (try simp_all [List.cons, List.nil]) <;>
        (try aesop)
        <;>
        (try {
          simp_all [getPutativeRoot_with_hash, singleHash, runWithOracle_pure]
          <;>
          (try simp_all [runWithOracle_bind, ih])
          <;>
          (try simp_all [List.cons, List.nil])
          <;>
          (try simp_all [Function.funext_iff])
          <;>
          (try ring_nf at *)
          <;>
          (try simp_all [Function.funext_iff])
          <;>
          (try simp_all [List.cons, List.nil])
          <;>
          (try aesop)
        })
      | ofRight idxRight =>
        simp_all [BinaryTree.SkeletonLeafIndex, Skeleton, runWithOracle_bind]
        <;>
        (try simp_all [getPutativeRoot_with_hash, singleHash, runWithOracle_pure]) <;>
        (try simp_all [runWithOracle_bind, ih]) <;>
        (try simp_all [List.cons, List.nil]) <;>
        (try simp_all [Function.funext_iff]) <;>
        (try ring_nf at *) <;>
        (try simp_all [Function.funext_iff]) <;>
        (try simp_all [List.cons, List.nil]) <;>
        (try aesop)
        <;>
        (try {
          simp_all [getPutativeRoot_with_hash, singleHash, runWithOracle_pure]
          <;>
          (try simp_all [runWithOracle_bind, ih])
          <;>
          (try simp_all [List.cons, List.nil])
          <;>
          (try simp_all [Function.funext_iff])
          <;>
          (try ring_nf at *)
          <;>
          (try simp_all [Function.funext_iff])
          <;>
          (try simp_all [List.cons, List.nil])
          <;>

have h_main : ∀ {s} (idx : BinaryTree.SkeletonLeafIndex s) (leafValue : α) (proof : List α) (f), (runWithOracle f (getPutativeRoot idx leafValue proof)) = (getPutativeRoot_with_hash idx leafValue proof fun (left right : α) => (f ⟨left, right⟩)) := by
    intro s
    intro idx leafValue proof f
    induction' proof with sibling restProof ih
    · -- Base case: proof is empty
      simp [getPutativeRoot, getPutativeRoot_with_hash]
    · -- Inductive step: proof is sibling :: restProof
      cases idx with
      | ofLeaf =>
        -- Case: idx is ofLeaf
        simp [getPutativeRoot, getPutativeRoot_with_hash, ih]
        <;>
        (try decide) <;>
        (try simp_all [runWithOracle_bind, runWithOracle_pure, singleHash, List.cons, List.nil]) <;>
        (try aesop)
      | ofLeft idx_left =>
        -- Case: idx is ofLeft
        simp_all [getPutativeRoot, getPutativeRoot_with_hash, ih, runWithOracle_bind, runWithOracle_pure, singleHash]
        <;>
        (try simp_all [Product.mk.injEq]) <;>
        (try aesop)
        <;>
        (try
          {
            congr 1 <;>
            simp_all [Product.mk.injEq] <;>
            aesop
          })
      | ofRight idx_right =>
        -- Case: idx is ofRight
        simp_all [getPutativeRoot, getPutativeRoot_with_hash, ih, runWithOracle_bind, runWithOracle_pure, singleHash]
        <;>
        (try simp_all [Product.mk.injEq]) <;>
        (try aesop)
        <;>
        (try
          {
            congr 1 <;>
            simp_all [Product.mk.injEq] <;>
            aesop
          })
  exact h_main idx leafValue proof f
